summary: Completed iteration 7 testing for real-time embedded terminal view in Anima VM page. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Header breadcrumb shows 'Anima VM', Terminal tab exists (data-testid='tab-terminal'), Terminal shows 'No sandbox provisioned' message (data-testid='terminal-no-sandbox') when no sandbox exists, all 7 monitor tabs work (Live Feed, Terminal, Exec Log, Agent Logs, Browsing, VMs, Message), stepper with 6 steps works correctly, POST /api/provision/web-terminal endpoint correctly returns error when no sandbox.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveTerminal component correctly implements 3 states: no-sandbox, connect (has sandbox but no session), and active view with iframe
Terminal tab correctly added to monitor tabs with data-testid='tab-terminal'
All data-testid attributes properly implemented: terminal-no-sandbox, terminal-connect, connect-terminal-btn, terminal-view, terminal-iframe, terminal-external-link, reconnect-terminal-btn
POST /api/provision/web-terminal endpoint correctly handles no-sandbox case with appropriate error message
Terminal iframe uses proper sandbox attribute for security
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these endpoints
seed_data_creation: N/A - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 added LiveTerminal component to AnimaVM.js. The terminal tab shows 3 states: (1) terminal-no-sandbox when no sandbox provisioned, (2) terminal-connect with connect-terminal-btn when sandbox exists but no terminal session, (3) terminal-view with terminal-iframe when session active. Backend POST /api/provision/web-terminal creates terminal session and returns terminal_url. Header breadcrumb correctly shows 'Anima VM' via pageLabels in Header.js. All 7 monitor tabs: tab-live, tab-terminal, tab-console, tab-logs, tab-browsing, tab-sandboxes, tab-message. All 6 stepper steps: step-sandbox, step-terminal, step-openclaw, step-claudecode, step-skills, step-deploy.

connect_state.shows_when: sandbox exists but no terminal session

response_without_sandbox.error: No sandbox yet. Create one first.

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/provision/status - 200 OK with sandbox, tools, nudges, terminal_url
GET /api/openclaw/status - 200 OK with openclaw, sandbox_summary, has_activity
GET /api/openclaw/actions - 200 OK with actions list and categories
POST /api/provision/web-terminal - 200 OK (returns error without sandbox, terminal_url with sandbox)
